finding_results.notes: Replaced the tactical admiration phrasing with Ledger-native bookkeeping language while preserving the literal threshold-distortion usage.

The chapter now opens on the shelf being destroyed and the pocket closing around them, with only the immediately actionable four-body geometry. The opening recap of the basin arithmetic, threshold dampening explanation, and repeated anti-spend instruction was removed.
Replaced backward day markers with duration and evening-light language so the chase reads as one forward-moving sequence from the chapter 17 launch into the threshold crossing.

summary: Revised Chapter 18 to start on fresh tactical pressure instead of recap, repaired the basin roster to the established four-opponent geometry, kept the chase clock moving forward into evening, and removed the flagged tactical 'shape' tic while preserving the literal threshold-distortion line.
